name: panasonic
tagline: A Better Life, A Better World
description: Panasonic is a global leader in electronic components, offering high-quality capacitors, relays, and passive components for automotive, industrial, and consumer electronics applications.
longDescription: Panasonic Corporation, founded in 1918 by Konosuke Matsushita, is one of the world's largest and most respected electronics manufacturers. With over a century of innovation, Panasonic has established itself as a trusted partner for electronic components across diverse industries. Their component division specializes in capacitors, relays, and passive components that power everything from consumer electronics to automotive systems and industrial equipment. Panasonic's commitment to quality is demonstrated through their rigorous manufacturing standards, comprehensive testing protocols, and continuous investment in R&D. The company's components are known for their reliability, long operational life, and excellent performance in demanding environments. As an authorized distributor, LiTong provides full access to Panasonic's extensive component portfolio with comprehensive technical support and reliable supply chain services.

seoTitle: Panasonic Capacitors & Relays | Authorized Distributor | LiTong
seoDescription: Authorized distributor of Panasonic capacitors and relays. Aluminum electrolytic, film capacitors, electromechanical and solid state relays for automotive and industrial applications.

faqs.question: Is LiTong an authorized distributor of Panasonic components?
faqs.answer: Yes, LiTong is an authorized distributor of Panasonic electronic components, including their full range of capacitors and relays. Our partnership with Panasonic ensures that all components supplied are genuine, factory-direct products with full manufacturer warranty and support. As an authorized distributor, we have direct access to Panasonic's engineering resources, technical documentation, and product training. This allows us to provide comprehensive technical support, application guidance, and reliable supply chain services to our customers. All Panasonic components purchased through LiTong come with complete traceability, quality certificates, and access to Panasonic's global support network.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to discuss your Panasonic component requirements and verify our current inventory availability.

faqs.question: What are Panasonic's core competencies in electronic components?
faqs.answer: Panasonic's core competencies in electronic components center on three key areas: materials science expertise, manufacturing precision, and reliability engineering. In capacitors, Panasonic excels in aluminum electrolytic technology with proprietary electrolyte formulations that provide extended operational life and high ripple current capability. Their film capacitors utilize advanced metallization techniques for self-healing properties and excellent AC performance. In relays, Panasonic's electromechanical relays are known for their compact size, high switching capacity, and long electrical life. Their solid state relays offer silent operation, fast switching, and virtually unlimited mechanical life. Panasonic's vertical integration - from raw materials to finished products - ensures consistent quality and enables rapid customization for specific applications.
faqs.decisionGuide: Explore our Panasonic product categories to find components that match your application requirements, or contact our FAE team for technical recommendations.

faqs.question: How do Panasonic components compare to other brands?
faqs.answer: Panasonic components are positioned as premium products with a strong focus on reliability and long operational life. In capacitors, Panasonic's aluminum electrolytic capacitors typically offer 20-30% longer lifetime compared to standard industry offerings, thanks to their advanced sealing technology and electrolyte formulations. Their film capacitors are known for excellent self-healing characteristics and stable capacitance over temperature. In relays, Panasonic's electromechanical relays often achieve 2-3x the electrical life of competing products, while their solid state relays provide superior noise immunity and switching speed. Panasonic's automotive-grade components (AEC-Q200 qualified) are particularly respected for their performance in harsh environments. While Panasonic components may have a slight price premium, the total cost of ownership is often lower due to reduced maintenance and longer service life.
faqs.decisionGuide: Request samples for comparative evaluation, or consult our FAE team for detailed technical comparisons with competing products.

faqs.question: What are the advantages of purchasing Panasonic components through LiTong?
faqs.answer: Purchasing Panasonic components through LiTong offers several distinct advantages. First, as an authorized distributor, we guarantee genuine Panasonic products with full manufacturer warranty and support. Second, we maintain strategic inventory of high-demand Panasonic series, enabling shorter lead times and just-in-time delivery. Third, our FAE team has deep technical expertise in Panasonic products and can provide application guidance, thermal analysis, and reliability calculations. Additionally, LiTong provides competitive pricing, flexible payment terms, and comprehensive documentation including certificates of conformance and traceability information.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team to discuss your project requirements and learn about our competitive pricing and value-added services.

faqs.question: What industries does Panasonic primarily serve with their components?
faqs.answer: Panasonic serves a diverse range of industries with their electronic components. The automotive sector is a major focus, with components designed for EV/HEV powertrains, battery management systems, charging infrastructure, and ADAS applications. Industrial automation is another key market, where Panasonic capacitors and relays are used in motor drives, PLCs, and power distribution equipment. The consumer electronics industry relies on Panasonic components for home appliances, AV equipment, and smart devices. Renewable energy applications include solar inverters, wind power systems, and energy storage solutions. Telecommunications infrastructure utilizes Panasonic components in base stations, networking equipment, and data centers. Panasonic's broad product portfolio and application expertise enable them to serve these diverse markets with tailored solutions.
faqs.decisionGuide: Browse our solutions section to see how Panasonic components are applied in your specific industry, or contact us for application-specific recommendations.

faqs.question: Does Panasonic offer automotive-qualified components?
faqs.answer: Yes, Panasonic offers a comprehensive portfolio of automotive-qualified components. Their AEC-Q200 qualified capacitors include aluminum electrolytic and film types specifically designed for automotive applications. These components undergo rigorous qualification testing including temperature cycling, mechanical shock, vibration, and high-temperature operational life testing. Panasonic's automotive capacitors are available with extended temperature ratings up to 150C for under-hood applications. In relays, Panasonic offers automotive-grade electromechanical relays with enhanced contact materials and sealing for harsh environments. All automotive-qualified components are manufactured under IATF 16949 quality management systems. Panasonic also provides comprehensive PPAP documentation support for automotive customers, including material composition declarations, process flow diagrams, and control plans.
faqs.decisionGuide: Filter our product listings by automotive qualification, or contact our automotive FAE specialist for component recommendations.

faqs.question: What technical support does LiTong provide for Panasonic products?
faqs.answer: LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for Panasonic products through our experienced FAE team. Our support services include component selection assistance based on application requirements, thermal analysis and lifetime calculations for capacitors, coil drive circuit design for relays, and application troubleshooting. We have access to Panasonic's extensive technical documentation including datasheets, application notes, and reliability data. For complex applications, our FAEs can perform detailed analysis and provide design recommendations. We also offer sample support for evaluation, reference design guidance, and coordination with Panasonic's factory applications engineers for specialized requirements. Our technical training programs help customer engineering teams understand Panasonic product capabilities and best practices for implementation.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our FAE team to discuss your technical requirements and schedule a design review session.

faqs.question: What is the typical lead time for Panasonic components?
faqs.answer: Lead times for Panasonic components vary based on product type, specifications, and market demand. Standard aluminum electrolytic capacitors typically have lead times of 8-14 weeks. Film capacitors, especially custom specifications, may require 12-16 weeks. Electromechanical relays in standard configurations usually have 6-10 week lead times, while solid state relays are typically 8-12 weeks. Automotive-qualified components may have longer lead times due to additional testing and qualification requirements. LiTong maintains strategic inventory of high-demand Panasonic series to support urgent requirements and reduce lead times for common parts. For high-volume or long-term projects, we recommend discussing demand forecasting and scheduling agreements with our sales team to ensure continuous supply and potentially secure better pricing.
faqs.decisionGuide: Contact our sales team with your forecasted volumes and delivery requirements to discuss inventory programs and scheduling agreements.
